title: Coordination Center - 211info
text: 211info’s Coordination Center helps people navigate community resources. Funded by Health Share of Oregon, 211info partners with Unite Us to complete this work. If you are a service provider and would like information about joining the network, please visit the Unite Us website . For information on health-related social needs benefits, please visit our HRSN page . Assistance Request If you reside in Clackamas, Multnomah, or Washington counties and would like to be connected to services near you, please complete the form on the Connect Oregon website . The information you enter is completely confidential. By completing the form, you’ll be entered into the Unite Us software. A 211info Care Coordinator will contact you within 3 business days after you submit the form. Please use the form on the Connect Oregon website only to request services for yourself, or a child (under 18 years old) or adult for whom you have legal guardianship. Consent submitted through this form should be signed by the person who would be receiving services, or signed by their parent or legal guardian only.
